memoryArtifacts.headline: William VI (c. 1173-17 September 1226)
memoryArtifacts.description:
William VI (c. 1173-17 September 1226) was the tenth Marquess of Montferrat from 1203 and titular King of Thessalonica from 1207.

zh.lifeSummary: 當William VI Marquess of Montferrat於1173年出生時，他的父親Boniface I Marquis of Montferrat23歲，母親Helena del Bosco23歲。他於1202年8月9日與Berta di Clavesana結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1225年9月17日在希臘Θεσσαλία享年52歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William VI Marquess of Montferrat于1173年出生时，他的父亲Boniface I Marquis of Montferrat23岁，母亲Helena del Bosco23岁。他于1202年8月9日与Berta di Clavesana结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1225年9月17日在希腊Θεσσαλία享年52岁。

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

nameMeanings.name: VI
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

historicEvents.description: The Crusades and the Latin rule of Constantinople.

en.lifeSummary: When William VI Marquess of Montferrat was born in 1173, his father, Boniface I Marquis of Montferrat, was 23 and his mother, Helena del Bosco, was 23. He married Berta di Clavesana on 9 August 1202. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 17 September 1225, in Thessaly, Greece, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William VI Marquess of Montferrat est né en 1173, son père, Boniface I Marquis of Montferrat, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Helena del Bosco, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Berta di Clavesana le 9 août 1202. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 17 septembre 1225, à Thessalia, Grèce, à l’âge de 52 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William VI Marquess of Montferrat 1173 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Boniface I Marquis of Montferrat 23 und seine Mutter Helena del Bosco 23. Er hat am 9. August 1202 Berta di Clavesana geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 17. September 1225 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Thessalia, Griechenland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William VI Marquess of Montferrat è nato il nel 1173, il suo padre, Boniface I Marquis of Montferrat, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Helena del Bosco, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Berta di Clavesana il 9 agosto 1202. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 17 settembre 1225, nel Thessalia, Grecia, all'età di 52 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William VI Marquess of Montferratが1173年に生まれた時，父Boniface I Marquis of Montferratは23歳，母Helena del Boscoは23歳であった。1202年8月9日にBerta di Clavesanaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1225年9月17日にギリシャΘεσσαλίαで52歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William VI Marquess of Montferrat(이)가 1173년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Boniface I Marquis of Montferrat(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Helena del Bosco(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1202년 8월 9일 Berta di Clavesana(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1225년 9월 17일 그리스 Θεσσαλία에서 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William VI Marquess of Montferrat nasceu em 1173, seu pai, Boniface I Marquis of Montferrat, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Helena del Bosco, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Berta di Clavesana em 9 de agosto de 1202. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 17 de setembro de 1225, em Thessalia, Grécia, com 52 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William VI Marquess of Montferrat родился в 1173 г., его отцу по имени Boniface I Marquis of Montferrat было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Helena del Bosco, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Berta di Clavesana 9 августа 1202 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 17 сентября 1225 г. в местности Θεσσαλία, Греция в возрасте 52 лет.

sm.from 1203 to 1226: mai le 1203 e o'o I le 1226

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William VI Marquess of Montferrat nació en 1173, su papá, Boniface I Marquis of Montferrat, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Helena del Bosco, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Berta di Clavesana el 9 de agosto de 1202. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 17 de septiembre de 1225, en Thessalia, Grecia, a la edad de 52 años.
